title: Thai Shrimp Salad
description: A refreshing and spicy Thai-inspired salad featuring succulent shrimp, crunchy vegetables, and a tangy citrus dressing.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
3. Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil.
5. Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Add the mixed greens to the skillet and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
7. In a large bowl, combine the cooked shrimp, wilted greens, and chopped red cabbage and carrots.
8. In a small bowl, whisk together the Thai peanut paste, citrus juice, and zest.
9. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
